title: Conflicts of law
doc_html:
§974.6. Conflicts of law

            Nothing in the Small Business Protection Act shall be construed to conflict with or supersede any applicable federal law, rule, or regulation.

            Acts 2008, No. 820, §1; Acts 2019, No. 204, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 2020; Acts 2022, No. 663, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 49:978.6.
doc_text:
§974.6.  Conflicts of law
Nothing in the Small Business Protection Act shall be construed to conflict with or
supersede any applicable federal law, rule, or regulation.
Acts 2008, No. 820, §1; Acts 2019, No. 204, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 2020; Acts 2022, No.
663, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 49:978.6.
